components-breadcrumbs.import:
import { Breadcrumbs } from "vite-ts-tailwind-template";
import { FaCompactDisc, FaHouse, FaMusic, FaUser, FaVolumeHigh } from "react-icons/fa6";

size.description:
The size of the breadcrumbs text and spacing.
@default "md"

color.description:
The color theme of the breadcrumbs.
@default "default"

variant.description:
The visual style variant of the breadcrumbs container.
@default "light"

underline.description:
The underline behavior of the breadcrumbs links.
@default "hover"

radius.description:
The border radius of the breadcrumbs container (applicable to solid and bordered variants).
@default "md"

items.description: Optional static items to display. If provided, dynamic generation from path is skipped.

isDisabled.description:
Whether the breadcrumbs are disabled.
@default false

startContent.description: Content to render at the start of the breadcrumbs container.

endContent.description: Content to render at the end of the breadcrumbs container.

Render Callback
stories.snippet:
const RenderCallback = () => { const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure(); return (

Render Callback Pattern

Allows children of DrawerContent to be a render function that receives the internal `onClose` callback argument.

{(onCloseInternal) => ( <> Render Function Drawer

This content is rendered via a child function callback, enabling child nodes to trigger closures directly via the parameter `onCloseInternal`.

)}
); };

components-dropdown.name: Dropdown

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <Dropdown placement="bottom-start" showArrow={false} closeOnSelect>
    <DropdownTrigger>
        <Button color="primary">Trigger Menu</Button>
    </DropdownTrigger>
    <DropdownMenu ariaLabel="Actions">
        <DropdownItem key="new">New file</DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="copy">Copy link</DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="edit">Edit file</DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="delete" color="danger" className="text-danger">Delete file
                    </DropdownItem>
    </DropdownMenu>
</Dropdown>;

stories.name: Disabled Keys
stories.snippet:
const DisabledKeys = () => (
  <Dropdown>
    <DropdownTrigger>
      <Button variant="bordered">Actions</Button>
    </DropdownTrigger>
    <DropdownMenu disabledKeys={["edit", "delete"]}>
      <DropdownItem key="new">New file</DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem key="copy">Copy link</DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem key="edit">Edit file</DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem key="delete" color="danger" className="text-danger">
        Delete file
      </DropdownItem>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </Dropdown>
);

stories.name: With Icons
stories.snippet:
const WithIcons = () => (
  <Dropdown>
    <DropdownTrigger>
      <Button color="secondary" variant="flat">Actions</Button>
    </DropdownTrigger>
    <DropdownMenu variant="flat" color="secondary">
      <DropdownItem key="new" startContent={<FaPen className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}>
        Edit file
      </DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem key="copy" startContent={<FaCopy className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}>
        Copy link
      </DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem key="share" startContent={<FaShare className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}>
        Share file
      </DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem
        key="delete"
        color="danger"
        className="text-danger"
        startContent={<FaTrash className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}
      >
        Delete file
      </DropdownItem>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </Dropdown>
);

stories.name: With Description
stories.snippet:
const WithDescription = () => (
  <Dropdown>
    <DropdownTrigger>
      <Button variant="bordered">File Options</Button>
    </DropdownTrigger>
    <DropdownMenu variant="flat" className="w-[260px]">
      <DropdownItem
        key="new"
        description="Create a new document in this folder"
        startContent={<FaPen className="text-default-500 w-4 h-4" />}
      >
        New file
      </DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem
        key="copy"
        description="Copy the shareable link to clipboard"
        startContent={<FaCopy className="text-default-500 w-4 h-4" />}
      >
        Copy link
      </DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem
        key="edit"
        description="Modify the existing draft file"
        startContent={<FaGear className="text-default-500 w-4 h-4" />}
      >
        Edit file
      </DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem
        key="delete"
        color="danger"
        description="Permanently delete the document"
        startContent={<FaTrash className="w-4 h-4" />}
      >
        Delete file
      </DropdownItem>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </Dropdown>
);

stories.name: Sections
stories.snippet:
const Sections = () => (
  <Dropdown>
    <DropdownTrigger>
      <Button color="default" variant="flat">My Account</Button>
    </DropdownTrigger>
    <DropdownMenu variant="flat" ariaLabel="User Actions">
      <DropdownSection title="Profile" showDivider>
        <DropdownItem key="profile" startContent={<FaUser className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}>
          My Profile
        </DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="settings" startContent={<FaGear className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}>
          Settings
        </DropdownItem>
      </DropdownSection>
      <DropdownSection title="Actions">
        <DropdownItem
          key="logout"
          color="danger"
          startContent={<FaArrowRightFromBracket className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}
        >
          Log Out
        </DropdownItem>
      </DropdownSection>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </Dropdown>
);

stories.name: Single Selection
Multiple Selection
Variants And Colors
Avatar Trigger
stories.snippet:
const AvatarTrigger = () => (
  <Dropdown placement="bottom-end">
    <DropdownTrigger>
      <Avatar
        src="https://i.pravatar.cc/150?u=a042581f4e29026704d"
        isBordered
        color="primary"
        className="cursor-pointer hover:opacity-85 transition-opacity"
      />
    </DropdownTrigger>
    <DropdownMenu variant="flat" color="primary" ariaLabel="Profile Actions">
      <DropdownSection title="Signed in as" showDivider>
        <DropdownItem key="user-info" description="zoey@example.com" className="h-14 gap-2">
          Zoey Lang
        </DropdownItem>
      </DropdownSection>
      <DropdownSection title="Options" showDivider>
        <DropdownItem key="settings" startContent={<FaGear className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}>
          My Settings
        </DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="team_settings">Team Settings</DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="analytics">Analytics</DropdownItem>
        <DropdownItem key="system">System</DropdownItem>
      </DropdownSection>
      <DropdownSection title="Danger Zone">
        <DropdownItem
          key="logout"
          color="danger"
          className="text-danger"
          startContent={<FaArrowRightFromBracket className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />}
        >
          Log Out
        </DropdownItem>
      </DropdownSection>
    </DropdownMenu>
  </Dropdown>
);

trigger.description: The trigger element (button, icon, etc.) that opens the popover

placement.description: Placement of the popover relative to the trigger

color.description: Color theme for the popover panel border/arrow

size.description: Size of the popover typography and padding

radius.description: Border radius of the popover panel

shadow.description: Shadow strength of the popover panel

showArrow.description: Show an arrow pointing from the panel to the trigger

offset.description: Offset in px between trigger and popover panel

isOpen.description: Whether to control open state externally

className.description: Additional CSS classes on the popover panel

triggerMode.description:
How the popover is triggered.
- "click" (default): toggles on trigger click
- "hover": opens on mouseenter and closes on mouseleave — use as a tooltip

delay.description:
Open / close delay in ms for hover mode.
@default { open: 0, close: 100 }

triggerClassName.description: Additional CSS classes on the popover trigger wrapper

repositionDeps.description: Dependencies that should trigger a repositioning calculation

components-tabs.import:
import { FaImage, FaMusic } from "react-icons/fa6";
import { Tab, Tabs } from "vite-ts-tailwind-template";

items.description: Array of tab items with id, label, content, and optional disabled state.

variant.description:
The visual style variant of the tabs.
@default "solid"

color.description:
The color theme of the tabs.
@default "primary"

size.description:
The size of the tab buttons.
@default "md"

radius.description:
The border radius of the tab buttons container/items.
@default "md"

activeKey.description: Optional custom key to control active state from parent.

onChange.description: Callback triggered when tab selection changes.

onSelectionChange.description: Callback triggered when tab selection changes (HeroUI compatibility).

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container.

placement.description:
Position of the tabs container relative to the content panel.
@default "top"

isDisabled.description:
Whether all tabs are disabled.
@default false

disabledKeys.description: Keys of tabs that should be disabled.

isFullUnderline.description:
Whether the underline variant stretches to the full width of its container.
@default false
